audit_items.proof_trace: compressed_stream.cc contains no pointer dereferences (no `*p`, `p->member`, or `p[i]` on any nullable pointer). Both factory functions pass `istream`/`ostream` pointer parameters as arguments to constructors implemented in external files and return the resulting pointers; no dereferencing occurs within this file. The `return NULL` paths are nominally unreachable due to `SCHECK(false)` → `abort()`, and even if reached (custom log handler), any caller-side null dereference occurs in binary_rpc_request.cc or rpc_client_impl.cc — outside this file's scope.
